description: Mixed retrieval: ARTICLE + PARAGRAPH chunks compete with no chunk_type filter.  ArticleDeduplicatorPostprocessor keeps the best-scored chunk per article (ARTICLE preferred within 2% margin), preventing top-k flooding. Winning PARAGRAPH chunks   upgraded to parent ARTICLE text at synthesis. ParagraphWindowReranker active.  Hypothesis: recovers run_17 performance on broad categories (liquidity, own_funds,      large_exposures) while preserving run_19 gains on localized/threshold cases.
